pr-evidence/public-native-contract-expor.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the public facade export patch with no blocking findings.
what_changed: Exposed the native probe adapter contract constant and record helper through the public document_kv_cache root facade.
Mirrored the same exports through the legacy restaurant_kv_serving root facade and the Cachet type stub.
Added public-package assertions that document_kv_cache, restaurant_kv_serving, and cachet resolve the same module-owned symbols.
pr-evidence/public-native-contract-expor.why: The adapter contract became a documented native-integration surface, so users should be able to import it from the same branded and compatibility facades as the rest of the engine-adapter API.
